summary: Dobong went DPK in both subs (인재근 갑 54.02, 오기형 을 53.01). 2024 split (PPP took 갑) wasn't foreshadowed by 2020 — both subs were comfortable DPK in 2020.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave (modest)
issues.description: Comfortable DPK margins; later gu fluidity not yet visible.
